case_title: MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA VS. NOBERT TEVES

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA SERVED OCT-24-2011, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1-10, INCLUSIVE
DECLARATION KATHRYN QUETEL FILED RE: LOST ORIGINAL RENTAL AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT TEVES, NOBERT SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TEVES, NOBERT THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 271 REY STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94134, **INCLUDING ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES**
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT TEVES, NOBERT
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA SERVED OCT-24-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT TEVES, NOBERT
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT TEVES, NOBERT
